ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the map played */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team participating in the match */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team participating in the match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "match_time" TEXT /* Time of the match */,
  "match_result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., win, loss, tie) */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., scheduled, in-progress, completed, canceled) */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the match is part of */,
  "best_of" INTEGER /* Number of maps played in a best-of series (e.g., best of 3, best of 5) */,
  "live_stream_url" TEXT /* URL for live streaming the match */,
  "match_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_map_id FOREIGN KEY ("map_id") REFERENCES maps ("map_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maps" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each map */,
  "map_name" TEXT /* Name of the map */,
  "game_title" TEXT /* Title of the game */,
  "game_mode" TEXT /* Game mode played on the map */,
  "map_size" TEXT /* Size of the map (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  "map_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the map image */,
  "map_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the map */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maps_game_title FOREIGN KEY ("game_title") REFERENCES game_titles ("game_title_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maps_game_mode FOREIGN KEY ("game_mode") REFERENCES game_modes ("game_mode_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_owner" TEXT /* Owner of the team */,
  "team_coach" TEXT /* Coach of the team */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "team_foundation_date" TEXT /* Date the team was founded */,
  "team_location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "team_social_media" TEXT /* Team's social media handles */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "player_email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "player_role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., captain, player) */,
  "player_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "player_nickname" TEXT /* In-game nickname of the player */,
  "player_rank" TEXT /* Rank or rating of the player */,
  "player_social_media" TEXT /* Player's social media handles */,
  "player_bio" TEXT /* Detailed biography of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rosters" (
  "roster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each roster */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "roster_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the team */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Status of the player (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "player_role_detail" TEXT /* Detailed information about the player's role (e.g., main carry, support) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rosters_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rosters_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match statistic */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "team1_score" INTEGER /* Score of the first team */,
  "team2_score" INTEGER /* Score of the second team */,
  "match_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the match */,
  "map_id" INTEGER /* ID of the map played */,
  "team1_bans" TEXT /* Bans made by team 1 */,
  "team2_bans" TEXT /* Bans made by team 2 */,
  "team1_picks" TEXT /* Picks made by team 1 */,
  "team2_picks" TEXT /* Picks made by team 2 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_stats_map_id FOREIGN KEY ("map_id") REFERENCES maps ("map_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "player_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "kills" INTEGER /* Number of kills by the player */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths of the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player */,
  "map_id" INTEGER /* ID of the map played */,
  "player_position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the map */,
  "player_kda" REAL /* Kill-death-assist ratio of the player */,
  "player_mvp" INTEGER /* Indicates if the player was the most valuable player in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_map_id FOREIGN KEY ("map_id") REFERENCES maps ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_titles" (
  "game_title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game title */,
  "game_title_name" TEXT /* Name of the game title */,
  "game_publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the game title */,
  "game_release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the game */,
  "game_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the game's image */,
  "game_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_modes" (
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game mode */,
  "game_mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the game mode */,
  "game_mode_description" TEXT /* Description of the game mode */,
  "game_mode_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the game mode's image */,
  "game_mode_rules" TEXT /* Detailed description of the game mode rules */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedule" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "match_time" TEXT /* Time of the match */,
  "match_location" TEXT /* Location of the match */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., league, tournament, friendly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedule_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., schedule, result) */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_channel" TEXT /* Channel where the notification was sent (e.g., email, SMS, app) */,
  "notification_content" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)
